subcodes.first_line: The dawn hath appeared upon the Temple of Man; verily it is the Book of the All-Merciful that was mentioned in the Scriptures of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الفجر علی هیکل الانسان انه لکتاب الرحمن الذی کان مذکورا فی صحف الله
subcodes.subjects: @essential distinction of Manifestation of God from others, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance
